cards.english: I hope that she is okay.
I want you to be happy.
Study so that you are ready.
It is important that he is honest.
I hope the food is hot when we arrive.
cards.answer: I hope **que** **la** food **esté** hot when we arrive.

cards.english: They want us to be a team.
I doubt that they are here.
Work hard so that you are the best.
It is possible that the store is closed.
I hope that we are ready for the trip.
She wants the house to be clean.
It is necessary that they are honest with the teacher.
I called so that you are not alone.
I hope it is not a problem.
Whatever it is, it is not important.
We save money so that the future is good.
cards.answer: We save money **para que** **el** future **sea** good.

cards.english: I doubt the coffee is still hot.
It is strange that the doors are open.
They want me to be a doctor.
Call me so that we are in contact.
